title: stylidium despectum
intro: Stylidium despectum, also known as the hidden triggerplant, is a rare and endangered species of plant in the genus Stylidium, native to Western Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of S. despectum include its potential to reduce inflammation and fight off bacterial and fungal infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into a tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be used topically as a poultice to aid in wound healing.
